hiring-pipeline.name: Automate Hiring Pipeline
hiring-pipeline.description: AI-powered candidate screening, resume parsing, and interview scheduling to accelerate recruitment.
hiring-pipeline.impact: Reduce time-to-hire by 40% and improve candidate quality matching

employee-onboarding.name: Smart Employee Onboarding
employee-onboarding.description: Automated onboarding workflows with personalized training paths and document management.
employee-onboarding.impact: Cut onboarding time by 50% and improve new hire productivity

team-performance.name: Team Performance Analytics
team-performance.description: AI-driven insights into team productivity, engagement patterns, and performance optimization.
team-performance.impact: Identify performance gaps early and boost team output by 20%

invoice-processing.name: Automate Invoice Processing
invoice-processing.description: Intelligent document extraction, validation, and routing for accounts payable automation.
invoice-processing.impact: Process invoices 5x faster with 95% accuracy, reducing manual errors

cash-flow-forecasting.name: Cash Flow Forecasting
cash-flow-forecasting.description: ML-powered predictions of cash inflows and outflows based on historical patterns and market signals.
cash-flow-forecasting.impact: Improve cash position accuracy by 30% and optimize working capital

expense-automation.name: Expense Management Automation
expense-automation.description: Automated expense categorization, policy compliance checking, and approval workflows.
expense-automation.impact: Reduce expense processing costs by 60% and eliminate policy violations

contract-review.name: AI Contract Review
contract-review.description: Automated analysis of contract terms, risk clauses, and compliance requirements using NLP.
contract-review.impact: Review contracts 10x faster while catching 95% of risk clauses

compliance-monitoring.name: Compliance Monitoring
compliance-monitoring.description: Continuous monitoring of regulatory changes and automated compliance gap analysis.
compliance-monitoring.impact: Stay ahead of regulatory changes and reduce compliance costs by 40%

business-intelligence.name: Business Intelligence Dashboard
business-intelligence.description: AI-powered analytics combining data from all business systems into actionable insights.
business-intelligence.impact: Make data-driven decisions 3x faster with unified business visibility

risk-assessment.name: Predictive Risk Assessment
risk-assessment.description: Machine learning models that identify business risks before they materialize from operational data.
risk-assessment.impact: Detect 80% of risks 2-4 weeks earlier than traditional methods

churn-prediction.name: Customer Churn Prediction
churn-prediction.description: AI models analyzing customer behavior patterns to predict and prevent customer churn.
churn-prediction.impact: Reduce customer churn by 25% with early intervention strategies
